name: @file-audit/analyzer
description: The document accessibility audit engine: content-based file-type detection plus the analyze + score pipeline for PDF, Word (.docx), PowerPoint (.pptx), and Excel (.xlsx). No Express, no db, no mailer, no env secrets — pure analysis. Ships plain .ts source (run natively via tsx; no compile step), consumed by apps/api (through re-export shims at the old services/* paths) and apps/cli.
